description: Monthly support cases in scope for routing
notes: Use only the queue or slice being evaluated

description: Pilot duration used for value estimate
notes: Keep the first pass short and measurable

description: One-time pilot cost for onboarding labeling and review
notes: Use internal or vendor cost basis

description: Fully loaded hourly cost for frontline support handling
notes: Use local loaded labor cost

description: Fully loaded hourly cost for senior or specialist reviewers
notes: Use local loaded labor cost

description: Blended hourly cost for escalation or rework work
notes: Can be a simple weighted average

description: Share of monthly cases that are clean routine candidates for faster routing
notes: Use a conservative estimate if no measured sample exists

description: Share of monthly cases currently sent to deep review
notes: Needed for senior-load estimate

description: Share of clean routine cases that currently receive unnecessary deep review
notes: Measure from spot review if possible

description: Expected reduction in unnecessary deep review from better routing
notes: Keep conservative because current evidence is still small-sample

description: Frontline minutes saved when an unnecessary deep review is avoided
notes: Count only time actually removed from workflow

description: Minutes saved on clean routine cases from faster handling
notes: Use zero if fast-path speed is not yet measurable

description: Share of deep-path cases that consume senior reviewer time
notes: Needed only if senior review is a real bottleneck

description: Expected reduction in senior-reviewed cases from better routing
notes: Separate from deep-review avoidance to avoid double counting

description: Senior reviewer minutes saved per avoided or shortened review
notes: Use observed queue data if available

description: Share of monthly cases that escalate reopen or require avoidable rework
notes: Use measured reopen or escalation rate when possible

description: Expected reduction in escalation reopen or rework from cleaner routing
notes: Set to zero if no credible estimate exists

description: Minutes saved when one escalation or rework loop is avoided
notes: Include only labor time in the first model

description: Short note on current evidence boundary
notes: Reference only as directional support and not as a direct ROI multiplier

description: Short note on strongest current comparison
notes: Keep sample-size caution attached in buyer conversations
